headline: SpaceX IPO leaves retail investors with too few shares and a tough hold-or-sell decision
summary: Those who did receive stock are taking different approaches, with some selling into the company's market debut while others are holding for the long haul.

headline: Schwab Stock Gains 2.7% as Client Assets, NNA Surge in May
summary: SCHW shares rise as May client assets hit $13.14T, with core NNA jumping 43% and new brokerage accounts climbing.

headline: Schwab Follows Vanguard With Fee Cuts on 4 ETFs
summary: The reductions aren’t raising stakes in the never-ending game of fee poker between asset managers. Rather, Schwab is calling their bets and refusing to fold.

headline: Charles Schwab (SCHW) Stock Valuation Check After Recent Momentum Cooldown
summary: Recent performance snapshot With no single headline event driving trading, Charles Schwab (SCHW) has been moving on its overall business profile and recent returns, as investors weigh how the diversified model fits into their portfolios. The stock is up 2.7% over the past day and 2.5% over the past week, while the move over the past month is close to flat. Over the past 3 months, the share price has declined 2.7%, and year to date it is down 10.3%. Over a longer horizon, Charles Schwab shows...
